export class ProfileAchievementsParser{constructor(){this._achievements=[];}flush(){this._achievements=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const total=wrapper.readInt();const rows=[];for(let i=0;i<total;i++){const id=wrapper.readInt();const key=wrapper.readString();const name=wrapper.readString();const current=wrapper.readInt();const target=wrapper.readInt();const xpReward=wrapper.readInt();const badgeUrl=wrapper.readString();const description=wrapper.readString();const groupKey=wrapper.readString();const groupOrder=wrapper.readInt();const levelOrder=wrapper.readInt();rows.push({id,key,name,current,target,xpReward,badgeUrl,description,groupKey,groupOrder,levelOrder});}this._achievements=rows;// ✅ Dispatch the exact event your React code is listening for
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('profile_achievements_update',{detail:{achievements:rows}}));return true;}get achievements(){return this._achievements;}}
